sub.domme: Build your presence, set your rules and let devotion flow — with full control over every euro.

hero.trust: Discreet · Age-verified · Secure payments via Stripe

a.p: Set your limits — per week or month. Subm8 warns and blocks before you go too far.

b.p: No real name needed. Your identity stays protected, your devotion private.

c.p: Full history with status: sent, processing, paid. Never in the dark.

a.p: You receive the full base amount. The platform fee is paid by the Sub on top.

b.p: AutoDrain charges automatically — daily, weekly, monthly. Passive income.

c.p: Transparent payout status from requested to paid. Always traceable.

sub.sub: Tools that make your devotion real and safe.
sub.domme: Tools that make real control and real income possible.

tributes.sub: Show your devotion with a direct gift of money — one click, instantly sent.
tributes.domme: Receive direct gifts with a clear breakdown — the full amount is yours.

autodrain.sub: Give automatically — daily, weekly, monthly. Cancel anytime, with a cost overview.
autodrain.domme: Recurring tributes that flow automatically. Passive, predictable income.

ownership.sub: Wear the profile your Mistress designs for you — visible to all as a sign of belonging.
ownership.domme: Design your Sub's profile. If they accept, they carry your mark — publicly visible.

contracts.sub: Binding Debt & Blackmail contracts make your submission serious and traceable.
contracts.domme: Set binding Debt & Blackmail contracts — the power dynamic in clear rules.

chats.sub: A direct line to your Mistress — with tip requests and media right in the thread.
chats.domme: Keep the direct line to your Subs — with tip requests and media in chat.

communities.sub: Join closed rooms, find like-minded people and learn from experienced Subs.
communities.domme: Start your own communities — Dommes only or mixed. Build your reach.

premium.sub: Show your status with exclusive badges and stand out from other Subs.
premium.domme: Exclusive badges and perks that show your premium status at a glance.

banners.sub: Stage your profile with a GIF or video — movement that stands out.
banners.domme: Present yourself with a GIF or video banner instead of a static image — stand out in the feed.

safe.sub: Age verification, secure payments, no real name. Your privacy stays yours.
safe.domme: Age verification and secure Stripe payments protect you and your earnings.

s1.p: Register free, choose your role, confirm your age. Discreet and done in minutes.

s2.sub: Discover Dommes, start a private chat and find your Mistress.
s2.domme: Get discovered, receive messages and build your Sub base.

s3.sub: Send tributes, set up AutoDrain, wear Ownership — securely paid.
s3.domme: Receive tributes, set contracts, get paid out — all traceable.

safety.title: Built on safety
safety.sub: Findom runs on trust. That's why Subm8 is secure from the ground up.
